title: Ice King - Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks
description: Changes the Cryomancer appearance in Iron's Spells ‘n Spellbooks Mode to the ice king from Adventure Time
body:
-Changes the appearance of the Cryomancer to the ice king from Adventure Time

-Adds red small stones and red texture to the ice wand

-Transforms the polar bear into Gunter, the ice king's favourite friend
